title: Turn Start AP Refresh
purpose: Set ap_current equal to ap_max, clear per-turn card trackers, unlock card play.

title: Validate Card Play
purpose: Block if not active turn, insufficient AP, or card already played this turn.

title: Apply Card Cost
purpose: Subtract AP cost from ap_current for played card.

title: Mark Card Played
purpose: Append action ID to cards_played_this_turn and set basic attack flag when relevant.

title: End Turn Handler
purpose: Lock card play and pass initiative to next combatant.

title: Forged On Add Initialize
purpose: Set species, initialize maintenance and chassis flags, prompt resistance and augmentation picks.

title: Forged Level 5 Unlock
purpose: Unlock and prompt second augmentation selection.

title: Forged Level 10 Replace
purpose: Offer one-time augmentation replacement workflow.

title: Forged Long Rest Maintenance
purpose: Validate maintenance kit support and apply degradation effect if missing.

title: Forged Resilience Handler
purpose: Process drop-to-1 behavior and consume rest-limited usage flag.

title: Forged Card Tag Initialize
purpose: Apply race tags and effect modifiers used by card resolution scripts.

title: Ironclad On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, initialize resource counters, and prompt Vein Oath discipline picks.

title: Ironclad Level Unlocks
purpose: Grant level-gated actions and update unlocked resources.

title: Resonance Fracture State
purpose: Apply or remove disadvantage state based on oath-violation and atonement resolution.

title: Resonant Surge Scaling
purpose: Upgrade surge duration and damage at level 16 and uses at level 20.

title: Ironclad Short Rest Reset
purpose: Reset short-rest resources.

title: Ironclad Long Rest Reset
purpose: Reset long-rest resources.

title: Blade-Sworn Bind Weapon
purpose: Bind selected weapon and apply return, disarm, and incorporeal traits.

title: Seventh Vein Final Action
purpose: Permit one final action before death finalization when capstone is active.

title: Ironclad Card Once per Turn Validator
purpose: Reject card play if card ID already exists in cards_played_this_turn.

title: Ironclad AP Cost Validator
purpose: Ensure ap_current is greater than or equal to ap_cost for non-free cards.

title: Ironclad Basic Attack Marker
purpose: Set basic_attack_used_this_turn true on basic attack card play.

title: Monster Turn Start AP Refresh
purpose: Set monster AP current to max and clear per-turn card trackers.

title: Monster Card Validator
purpose: Enforce active turn, AP availability, once-per-turn-per-card, and basic attack limit.

title: Monster AP Cost Apply
purpose: Subtract AP cost after successful monster card play.

title: Monster Card Played Log
purpose: Append card ID to monster cards played list and set basic attack usage when relevant.

title: Monster AI Card Choice
purpose: Select card sequence based on role, threat state, and AP budget.

title: Monster AI Target Selection
purpose: Determine target lock using threat, position, and health heuristics.

title: Monster End Turn
purpose: Finalize turn and pass initiative.

title: Monster Reaction Reset
purpose: Reset monster reaction usage for new round.

title: Status Apply Resolver
purpose: Add status, initialize duration and stacks, and handle refresh or add stack rule.

title: Status Tick Start
purpose: Process start-of-turn effects.

title: Status Tick End
purpose: Process end-of-turn effects and decrement durations.

title: Status Expire Cleanup
purpose: Remove expired statuses and reset derived fields.

title: Status Damage Pipeline
purpose: Apply Guard, Expose, Vulnerable, and Pierce interactions in deterministic order.

title: Status Card Lock Checks
purpose: Enforce Stagger, Silence, and Root restrictions against card categories and tags.

title: Status Cleanse or Dispel
purpose: Remove eligible status by dispel group rules.

title: Tethered On Add Initialize
purpose: Set species, lock aug_count to 0, initialize passives.

title: Echoed On Add Initialize
purpose: Set species, initialize already_died tracker and afterlife awareness.

title: Echoed Already Died Trigger
purpose: Drop to 1 HP instead of 0 if tracker unused; consume usage.

title: Wireborn On Add Initialize
purpose: Set species, initialize signal vulnerability and digital navigation flags.

title: Stitched On Add Initialize
purpose: Set species, prompt component A and B selection, initialize drift state.

title: Shellbroken On Add Initialize
purpose: Set species, initialize survivor clarity and Hollow Author connection flags.

title: Shellbroken Survivor Clarity Trigger
purpose: Apply Guard 4 as free reaction when first dropped below half HP in combat.

title: Iron Blessed On Add Initialize
purpose: Set species, prompt Tended/Unregistered subtype, set hand size modifier accordingly.

title: Diminished On Add Initialize
purpose: Set species, initialize environmental awareness, lean target, and infrastructure knowledge.

title: Ronin On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, set corrupted resonance signature, initialize oath status to Masterless.

title: Ronin Long Rest Reset
purpose: Clear contract target if contract type changed; restore any rest-limited resources.

title: Ashfoot On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, set caste tier to Low, set enhancement quality to salvage.

title: Ashfoot Short Rest Reset
purpose: Restore any short-rest limited resources.

title: Veilblade On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, set resonant signature to suppressed, enable wire integration.

title: Veilblade Short Rest Reset
purpose: Restore short-rest resources.

title: Oni Hunter On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, clear quarry mark, initialize dissolution resonance to 0.

title: Oni Hunter Set Quarry Mark
purpose: Set quarry_marked to true; record target ID in target_lock.

title: Oni Hunter Short Rest Reset
purpose: Clear quarry mark; reset short-rest resources.

title: Forge Tender On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, initialize community dependent flag, prompt Resonance Keeper alignment.

title: Forge Tender Short Rest Reset
purpose: Restore short-rest heal uses.

title: Forge Tender Long Rest Reset
purpose: Restore all long-rest heal resources.

title: Wireweave On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, prompt subclass path selection.

title: Wireweave Short Rest Reset
purpose: Restore short-rest signal resources.

title: Chrome Shaper On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, initialize experimental designs counter.

title: Chrome Shaper Config Switch
purpose: Apply stat modifiers for the new configuration and remove previous.

title: Chrome Shaper Short Rest Reset
purpose: Restore configuration switch resources.

title: Pulse Caller On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, enable integrated weapon, initialize preconscious fire to false.

title: Pulse Caller Short Rest Reset
purpose: Restore pulse arm short-rest resources.

title: Iron Monk On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, initialize between_state and below_half_bonus to false.

title: Iron Monk Between State Toggle
purpose: Toggle between_state boolean and apply/remove state-conditional modifiers.

title: Iron Monk Below Half HP Tracker
purpose: Update Below Half HP Bonus Active flag when HP drops below or rises above 50% of max.

title: Iron Monk Long Rest Reset
purpose: Reset long-rest resources.

title: Echo Speaker On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, enable afterlife affinity, initialize grief stacks to 0.

title: Echo Speaker Grief Accumulate
purpose: Increment grief stacks by 1 when an ally drops to 0 HP within range.

title: Echo Speaker Long Rest Reset
purpose: Reset grief stacks and long-rest resources.

title: Void Walker On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, initialize incorporeal_state to false, anchor_points to 0.

title: Void Walker Phase Toggle
purpose: Toggle incorporeal_state; apply or remove phase-conditional defense modifiers.

title: Void Walker Short Rest Reset
purpose: Restore short-rest phase resources.

title: Sutensai On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, set reader_authority to true, set echomind_reading_level to 1.

title: Sutensai HP Cost Card Payment
purpose: If player chooses HP cost variant: validate HP available and deduct instead of AP.

title: Sutensai Long Rest Reset
purpose: Reset any long-rest limited resources.

title: Flesh Shaper On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, initialize hp_tier to full.

title: Flesh Shaper HP Tier Tracker
purpose: Update hp_tier attribute (full/wounded/critical) based on current HP percentage.

title: Flesh Shaper Long Rest Reset
purpose: Reset long-rest heal resources and clear crisis mend extra use if applicable.

title: Puppet Binder On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, vessel_active to false, binding_threads to 0.

title: Puppet Binder Apply Bind
purpose: Increment binding_threads; record target; set vessel_active if first bind.

title: Puppet Binder Release Bind
purpose: Decrement binding_threads; clear vessel_active if count reaches 0.

title: Puppet Binder Long Rest Reset
purpose: Clear all binds; reset vessel_active to false; reset binding_threads to 0.

title: Blood Smith On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, set enhancement_status to stable.

title: Blood Smith HP Cost Payment
purpose: Deduct listed HP cost from current HP before resolving card; block if HP too low.

title: Blood Smith Enhancement Stress Check
purpose: Update enhancement_status based on current HP: stable/stressed/failing thresholds.

title: Blood Smith Long Rest Reset
purpose: Reset enhancement_status to stable; restore any long-rest resources.

title: Hollow On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, prompt Empty/Shell path choice, initialize hp_percent to 100.

title: Hollow HP Percent Tracker
purpose: Recalculate and update hp_percent attribute after each HP change.

title: Hollow Long Rest Reset
purpose: Reset long-rest resources.

title: Shadow Daimyo On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, initialize intelligence_gathered to 0, active_contacts to 0.

title: Shadow Daimyo Apply Intelligence
purpose: Increment intelligence_gathered by 1.

title: Shadow Daimyo Activate Contact
purpose: Decrement active_contacts by 1 and apply contact-specific benefit.

title: Shadow Daimyo Long Rest Reset
purpose: Restore contact slots; reset intelligence if path specifies.

title: Voice of Debt On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, initialize detonations_used to 0.

title: Voice of Debt Apply Debt Stacks
purpose: Add specified Debt stacks to target; update serialized debt map.

title: Voice of Debt Detonate
purpose: Read target Debt stacks; calculate detonation damage; clear stacks; increment detonations_used.

title: Voice of Debt Encounter Reset
purpose: Reset detonations_used to 0.

title: Merchant Knife On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, initialize intelligence and debt tracking maps to empty.

title: Merchant Knife Apply Intelligence
purpose: Increment intelligence stacks on target; update serialized intelligence map.

title: Merchant Knife Long Rest Reset
purpose: Clear intelligence maps; restore long-rest contact resources.

title: Iron Herald On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, command_zone_active to false, priority_target to empty, zone_radius to 15.

title: Iron Herald Establish Command Zone
purpose: Set command_zone_active to true; announce zone establishment.

title: Iron Herald Collapse Zone
purpose: Collapse Command Zone if character is incapacitated or moves beyond zone boundary.

title: Iron Herald Set Priority Target
purpose: Write target ID to priority_target attribute.

title: Iron Herald Short Rest Reset
purpose: Restore short-rest command resources; keep zone active if not disrupted.

title: Curse Eater On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, initialize loaded_count to 0, corruption_points to 0.

title: Curse Eater Absorb
purpose: Read one debuff from target ally; remove it from ally; increment loaded_count by 1.

title: Curse Eater Purge Loaded
purpose: Use loaded_count to determine purge radius/power; decrement loaded_count.

title: Curse Eater Corruption Accumulate
purpose: When Consumed path: increment corruption_points on heavy absorb; apply transformation thresholds.

title: Curse Eater Long Rest Reset
purpose: Reduce loaded_count by half; reset any long-rest corruption thresholds.

title: Shell Dancer On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, cascade_count to 0, in_shell_step to false, shell_step_turns to 0.

title: Shell Dancer Cascade Generator
purpose: On taking damage, increment cascade_count by 1 (max 10).

title: Shell Dancer Enter Shell Step
purpose: Set in_shell_step to true; set shell_step_turns to 2.

title: Shell Dancer Shell Step Tick
purpose: Decrement shell_step_turns by 1; if reaches 0 set in_shell_step to false.

title: Shell Dancer Spend Cascade
purpose: Deduct cascade cost from cascade_count; enforce minimum 0.

title: Shell Dancer Long Rest Reset
purpose: Reset cascade_count to 0; clear shell step state.

title: Fracture Knight On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, phantom_charges to 2, fracture_stacks_self to 0.

title: Fracture Knight Phantom Charge Generate
purpose: Increment phantom_charges by listed amount; cap at 6.

title: Fracture Knight Phantom Charge Spend
purpose: Deduct cost from phantom_charges; enforce minimum 0; block card if insufficient.

title: Fracture Knight Apply Fracture Self
purpose: Increment fracture_stacks_self when self-fracture card is played.

title: Fracture Knight Apply Target Fracture
purpose: Increment fracture stacks on a specific target using serialized fracture_target_map; announce stack count.

title: Fracture Knight Short Rest Reset
purpose: Restore phantom_charges to 2 + any level bonus.

title: Fracture Knight Long Rest Reset
purpose: Restore phantom_charges to maximum; clear fracture_stacks_self.

title: Unnamed On Add Initialize
purpose: Set class label, initialize active_stat, prompt Convergent/Divergent path choice.

title: Unnamed Active Stat Shift
purpose: Update active_stat attribute to the stat defined by played card's current shift condition.

title: Unnamed Name Card
purpose: Write player-chosen name to card's condition field; announce naming event.

title: Unnamed Long Rest Reset
purpose: Reset any unnamed-specific rest resources.
